custom-sql.sql: SELECT COUNT(CalEvent.eventId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM CalEvent WHERE (CalEvent.groupId = ?) AND (CalEvent.startDate >= ?) AND (CalEvent.startDate <= ?) AND (CalEvent.timeZoneSensitive = ?) AND (CalEvent.repeating = ?) [$TYPE$]

SELECT {CalEvent.*} FROM CalEvent WHERE (CalEvent.remindBy != ?) AND ( ( (CalEvent.repeating = [$FALSE$]) AND (CalEvent.startDate >= ?) ) OR ( (CalEvent.repeating = [$TRUE$]) AND (CalEvent.endDate >= ? OR CalEvent.endDate IS NULL) ) ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM User_ WHERE User_.userId = CalEvent.userId )
SELECT {CalEvent.*} FROM CalEvent LEFT JOIN AssetEntry ON (AssetEntry.classPK = CalEvent.eventId) WHERE (AssetEntry.classPK IS NULL)
SELECT {CalEvent.*} FROM CalEvent WHERE (CalEvent.groupId = ?) AND (CalEvent.startDate >= ?) AND (CalEvent.startDate <= ?) AND (CalEvent.timeZoneSensitive = ?) AND (CalEvent.repeating = ?) [$TYPE$]
